base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_hud — a ui from 1997 final fantasy vii. ATB battle UI + limit-break gauge + magic submenu. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: ATB battle UI + limit-break gauge + magic submenu
